---
title: "Cardiovascular Disease Surveillance"
description: "BNR surveillance outputs for stroke, heart attack, and related cardiovascular disease indicators."
title-block-style: none

sidebar: cvd

listing:
  - id: cvd-outputs
    contents:
      - "briefings/*.qmd"
    type: table
    sort: "date desc"
    categories: true
    sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    page-size: 10
    field-display-names:
      title: "Report"
    date-format: medium
    table-hover: true

format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-title: "On this page"
    toc-depth: 2
    toc-location: right
    anchor-sections: true
    smooth-scroll: true
    link-external-icon: false
    link-external-newwindow: false
    page-layout: article
---

The Barbados National Registry monitors major cardiovascular events, including stroke and heart attack, to support public health planning, service improvement, and population health surveillance.

## Latest CVD outputs

::: {#cvd-outputs}
:::
